vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Structural integrity for wing spar reinforcement
Motor mount with bolt pattern for motor pylon

Pod shell for overall structure

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Use compatible materials or design expansion joints.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow due to blockage in cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Ensure clear path for airflow and regular maintenance checks.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening bolts leading to material damage.
risk.mit: Specify torque limits and provide torque wrenches.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate structural integrity if spar attachment flange is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment tools and double-check alignment.

risk.desc: Risk of equipment bay door not opening fully due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Include clearance checks during assembly and adjust as necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon mount

physics_paths.path_description: Heat from equipment bay radiates through the pod's outer skin
Airflow from cooling inlet cools motor pod dummy
Structural loads from wing spar transferred to pod shell
Opening and closing motion of equipment bay door
Electrical harnesses run from equipment bay to pod shell

integration_opportunities.integration_description: Attach spar attachment flange to wing spar
Mount door hinge to equipment bay door
Mount motor mount to motor pylon

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Provide attachment points for wing skin, fuselage frame, and anti-rotation key
Ensure continuous load path from wing skin through ribs to main spar, then to fuselage frames via carry-through
Verify heat dissipation from electronics and solar radiation through CFRP to wing skin
Verify wing flexion and torsion resistance by main spar and anti-rotation key
Provide service access for battery and payload

verify.value: All required evidence features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All primary features and datums are visible and labeled.
verify.rule: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled.

verify.value: Interfaces have clear connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Some critical joints lack visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of primary locating faces and axis rings during assembly.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment tools and visual/tactile inspection during assembly.

risk.desc: Insufficient evidence for preload or locking mechanisms in critical joints.
risk.mit: Add visible locking evidence and specify preload intent or torque values.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP and EPP foam core.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis and adjust design as necessary to accommodate expansion.

risk.desc: Limited clearance around moving parts may cause assembly difficulty.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance fits to ensure ease of assembly.

risk.desc: Insufficient traceability between P0 design and geometry operations.
risk.mit: Ensure all primary features and datums are clearly labeled and visible.

Heat from electronics and solar radiation dissipates through CFRP to wing skin
Wing flexion and torsion are resisted by main spar and anti-rotation key
Battery and payload access via slide rails and service ports
